title: Violet's Demand List
text:
## Official Demands

*From Violet the tortie cat:*

**Breakfast:** Must include {adjective} food served in the {adjective} bowl only.

**Sunbeam:** The sunbeam on the {place} belongs to Violet from {number} AM to {number} PM.

**Staff rules:**
- {verb} before entering the room
- Avoid {adjective} noises

**Petting:** Allowed only on the {body part} for {number} seconds.

**Zebby:** May not {verb} near Violet's {place}.

**Violations:** {adjective} stares and one {adjective} item knocked off a shelf.

Signed with a {color} paw print.
